notes: All 46 organizations from the index have a corresponding detail page (page_04.png = org 1/booklet p9 through page_49.png = org 46/booklet p54); no detail pages were missing.
Org 33 (ઘનશ્યામનગર ઉપાશ્રય, page_36) has no fixed ઠાણા/sadhvi roster printed — the page instead describes two visiting Mahasatijis for Paryushan, so sadhvis=[] for this org.

Org 36 (રાજસ્થાન ઉપાશ્રય - હઠીસિંગ, page_39) and Org 41 (વર્ધમાન જ્ઞાન આરાધના ટ્રસ્ટ, page_44) are printed in Hindi/Devanagari script rather than Gujarati; name/address/sadhvis for these two are transcribed as printed (Hindi).

Org 46 (સુધર્મા સ્થા. જૈન સંઘ, page_49) lists one muni (પ.પૂ. ચેતનમુનિ મ.સા.) together with two sadhvis under a combined ઠાણા list ('1' then 'અને' then '2,3'); all three were kept in the sadhvis array as printed since the page groups them together.
The optional 'વિરતીધર ઉપાશ્રય' (booklet page 54-A) mentioned as possibly present was not found; the PDF/rendered pages end at page_49.png (booklet p54) with org 46, and there is no 47th detail page.

Secretary mobile numbers were taken directly from the user-supplied index list (already in Arabic numerals) rather than re-derived from the Gujarati-numeral phone text on each page; spot checks (e.g. org 36, org 46) matched the printed page phone numbers.

Address fields exclude phone/mobile numbers where they were embedded inline in the address text on the page, to keep the address field clean; some pages had multiple contact numbers (president/secretary/upashray) which were not all captured since only secretary_mobile was requested in the output schema.
